name: ZUU Co.,Ltd.
summary: ZUU Co.,Ltd. operates financial media platforms in Japan and Singapore. The company operates ZUU online that offers financial information; and ZUU online SINGAPORE, a finance education portal that is bridging the gap between the asymmetry of information between individual investors and the financial industry. It also provides finance and real estate Web marketing support services; and media services. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
